title: Legal Document Archiving System Review: LegalArchive vs DocStore Pro 2026 Comparison
description: Compare LegalArchive and DocStore Pro legal document archiving systems. Analyze archiving classification, long-term storage, archive retrieval, and compliance archiving features. Find the best solution for your legal document long-term preservation needs!
content:
Legal Document Archiving System Overview

Legal document archiving systems are used for long-term preservation of legal documents, meeting compliance archiving requirements. In 2026, LegalArchive and DocStore Pro are two leading professional products. This review compares their archiving features.

Archiving Classification

Archiving FeaturesLegalArchiveDocStore Pro
Auto ClassificationAI smart archiving classificationManual classification
Classification RulesCustom archiving rulesFixed classification templates
Tag ManagementMulti-dimensional tag systemSingle tags
Archive PathFlexible archive path definitionFixed archive path

Long-term Storage

LegalArchive supports long-term storage, storage expansion, and storage optimization. DocStore Pro has basic storage features. For long-term large volume storage, LegalArchive is recommended.

Archive Retrieval

LegalArchive offers powerful archive retrieval with quick search, retrieval history, and retrieval reports. DocStore Pro has basic retrieval features. For efficient archive retrieval, LegalArchive is recommended.

Compliance Archiving

LegalArchive meets legal archiving compliance requirements, supporting retention periods, archive audit, and archive destruction. DocStore Pro has basic compliance archiving. For compliance archiving needs, LegalArchive is recommended.

Storage Cost

DocStore Pro has low storage cost, supporting compressed storage and deduplication storage. LegalArchive has higher storage cost. For storage cost sensitivity, DocStore Pro is recommended.

Price and Selection

LegalArchive annual fee: 150,000 CNY; DocStore Pro annual fee: 80,000 CNY. For compliance archiving and long-term storage, choose LegalArchive. For storage cost sensitivity, choose DocStore Pro.
author: Document Archiving Expert
